# AI Color Analysis Engine

## Core Purpose
An on-device, privacy-first web application that utilizes client-side computer vision (via face-api.js and fallback HTML5 canvas pixel matrix analysis) to determine a user's surface skin tone, sub-surface biological undertone, and macro seasonal color palette type (e.g., Warm Spring, Deep Autumn, True Winter, Light Summer).

## Key Tool Capabilities & URLs
- Personal Color Profiler: https://aicoloranalysis.online/index.html
- Interactive Dress Color Checker: https://aicoloranalysis.online/index.html#dressCheckerSection
- E-Commerce Live Product Carousel: https://aicoloranalysis.online/index.html#shopSection

## Technical Specifications
- Execution Framework: 100% Client-Side JavaScript.
- Privacy Standard: Zero images or face maps are transmitted to external servers. All computing is strictly local.
- Diagnostic Methodology: Measures comparative pixel balancing distribution channels across the localized upper face head region.
